summary: Completed comprehensive testing of COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) recognition feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100% success rate). Frontend verification confirmed proper journal entry creation, auto-generation of account codes, and dynamic business name in sidebar.

backend: TestChartOfAccountsAutoCode::test_get_chart_of_accounts - Chart of Accounts API returns accounts
TestChartOfAccountsAutoCode::test_create_account_with_auto_code - Creating account with auto-generated code works
TestCOGSJournalEntries::test_create_sales_order_creates_revenue_journal_entry - Sales Order creates SALE entry (Debit AR 1300, Credit Revenue 4100)
TestCOGSJournalEntries::test_create_sales_order_creates_cogs_journal_entry - Sales Order creates COGS entry (Debit 5100, Credit Inventory 1400)
TestCOGSJournalEntries::test_sales_return_reverses_revenue_entry - Sales Return creates RET entry (reverses revenue)
TestCOGSJournalEntries::test_sales_return_reverses_cogs_entry - Sales Return creates RCOGS entry (reverses COGS)
TestJournalEntryBalance::test_all_entries_are_balanced - All journal entries have equal debits and credits
frontend_ui: Login page loads and login works
Dashboard displays with dynamic business name 'My Test Company' in sidebar
Chart of Accounts page loads with account categories (Asset, Liability, Equity, Income, Expense)
Add Account modal shows auto-generated account code (e.g., '1501' for asset)
Auto-generation hint text 'Code is auto-generated based on account type' displays
Sales Orders page shows 8 sales orders with status indicators
General Ledger shows journal entries with SALE-, COGS-, RET-, RCOGS- prefixes
Expanded COGS entry shows correct double-entry structure (5100 Purchases Debit, 1400 Inventory Credit)

cogs_recognition.sales_order_creates_revenue_entry: VERIFIED - SALE-xxxxxxxx entries created with AR debit and Revenue credit
cogs_recognition.sales_order_creates_cogs_entry: VERIFIED - COGS-xxxxxxxx entries created with COGS/Purchases debit and Inventory credit
cogs_recognition.sales_return_reverses_revenue: VERIFIED - RET-xxxxxxxx entries reverse the revenue entry
cogs_recognition.sales_return_reverses_cogs: VERIFIED - RCOGS-xxxxxxxx entries restore Inventory and reverse COGS

auto_generate_account_codes.ui_implementation: VERIFIED - Code input is read-only with hint text

dynamic_business_name.sidebar_display: VERIFIED - Shows company name from /auth/me response

seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_COGS_Customer and TEST_COGS_Product With Cost for testing. Multiple sales orders and returns were created to verify COGS journal entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: COGS recognition feature is fully implemented and working. When a sales order is created, two journal entries are generated: (1) Revenue entry (Debit AR 1300, Credit Revenue 4100) and (2) COGS entry (Debit COGS 5100, Credit Inventory 1400). Sales returns properly reverse both entries. Auto-generate account codes feature works in Chart of Accounts. Dynamic business name displays in sidebar from /auth/me API.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB persistence
